summary: Push-Benachrichtigungen Feature vollständig getestet. PUSH Tab im Admin-Dashboard (/admin/shop) ist sichtbar und funktioniert korrekt. Alle Backend APIs arbeiten wie erwartet. Frontend zeigt alle UI-Elemente korrekt an.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/push/vapid-key - Returns VAPID public key
Backend: POST /api/push/subscribe - Creates subscription with auth
Backend: GET /api/push/subscriptions - Returns list of admin subscriptions
Backend: POST /api/push/customer/subscribe - No auth required for customers
Backend: GET /api/push/customer/stats - Returns total_subscriptions, with_account, anonymous
Backend: POST /api/push/broadcast - Validates required fields (title, body)
Frontend: PUSH Tab visible in Admin Dashboard tabs
Frontend: Statistics section shows GESAMT ABONNENTEN, MIT KONTO, ANONYM
Frontend: Message form has TITEL input (data-testid='push-title-input')
Frontend: Message form has NACHRICHT textarea (data-testid='push-body-input')
Frontend: Message form has LINK input (data-testid='push-url-input')
Frontend: GESENDETE NACHRICHTEN history section displays
Frontend: History shows sent broadcasts with title, body, sent/failed counts, target
Frontend: HINWEIS info box explains push notification requirements
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
VAPID keys are configured in backend/.env
Push broadcasts are saved to push_broadcasts collection with history tracking
Failed push subscriptions are marked as inactive (410/404 response handling)
Statistics endpoint correctly calculates total - with_account = anonymous
seed_data_creation: Test subscriptions created via /api/push/customer/subscribe during testing

mocked_apis.note: pywebpush sends real push notifications when VAPID keys are configured
mocked_apis.broadcast_behavior: Broadcasts work but fail delivery to test endpoints (which is expected)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Push-Benachrichtigungen Feature ist vollständig implementiert und getestet. PUSH Tab in /admin/shop zeigt Statistiken, Nachricht-Formular mit Zielgruppen-Auswahl (Alle/Nur Kunden/Nur Admins), und Historie der gesendeten Nachrichten. Backend APIs: /api/push/customer/stats, /api/push/broadcasts, /api/push/broadcast (POST), /api/push/customer/subscribe (POST) alle funktionieren.
